name: curweb-app
description: CurWeb — Gesture & Voice Controlled Telegram Mini App

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.render:build: npm run install:all && cd backend && npx prisma generate --schema=src/db/schema.prisma && npx prisma db push --schema=src/db/schema.prisma && cd ../frontend && npm run build
